title: SolarEdge (SEDG) to Report Q2 Earnings: What's in the Cards?
text: SolarEdge Q2 2024 Earnings Expectations. Report Date: August 7, 2024 after market close. Key Expectations: Financial Forecasts: Revenue consensus: 258.2 million (74% decrease year-over-year). Earnings forecast: Loss of 1.56 per share (versus 2.62 profit in Q2 2023). Headwinds Expected: The company faced several challenges heading into Q2: Demand slowdown: significant slowdown in demand for its products for the past couple of quarters. European markets: Unfavorable dynamics in Germany and the Netherlands due to regulatory issues. Margin pressure: Continued adoption of lower-margin single-phase batteries in the U.S. Operational charges: Higher restructuring and discontinued operations costs. Potential Bright Spots: Positive contributions from U.S. commercial markets and solar operations in Australia, Taiwan, Thailand, and Israel. Synergies from the April 2024 Wevo acquisition. Improved warranty costs and reduced shipment expenses. Analyst Outlook: Despite challenges, Zacks analysts predict an earnings beat, citing a positive Earnings ESP of +5.13% combined with a Zacks Rank #3 rating.
